$comment: Generative news-article corpus for the 1990s (sleek, analytical broadsheet-sports voice — telemetry, carbon brakes, semi-automatic gearboxes, the fully professional era and its rivalries; measured and data-literate, cooler than the 80s), parsed by Companion.Core.News.NewsArticleBank. Keys under 'bodies' are 'journalPhase|cause'; each holds era-keyed body templates selected deterministically via the 'headlines' PCG32 stream. Bodies compose literal prose, fact tokens, and {pool:name} references into 'pools'. Fact tokens: {player} {team} {race} {year} {round} {position} {expected} {winner} {fieldSize} {champPosition} {champMove} {champLeader}. Add new eras/events by adding JSON only — no code.

1990s: PADDOCK REPORT — {race}, {year}.
From the pit lane at {race}.
Telemetry filed from {race}, round {round} of the {year} season.
Grand Prix report: {race}, {year}.
Our motorsport correspondent, {race}, round {round}.
The data screens in the garage tell a happy story tonight.
A result the engineers will replay lap by lap with satisfaction.
Momentum, and the paddock can feel it shifting.
One for the debrief, and a benchmark to build on.
The {team} camp has every reason to be pleased with the numbers.
The telemetry will be picked over for answers long after the trucks leave.
A weekend to log, analyse, and put behind them.
The engineers face a long night over the data.
Quiet in the garage as the laptops close.
Not the numbers anyone in the {team} camp wanted to read.
default: The team regroups for the next round.

1990s: In the championship {player} holds {champPosition}, {champMove}.
The title table reads {player} {champPosition} — {champMove} — with {champLeader} setting the pace.
{player} sits {champPosition} in the standings, {champMove} on the season.
That leaves {player} {champPosition} in the title race, {champMove}, chasing {champLeader}.
from a car the form guide rated no better than {expected}
against a grid slot that projected {expected}
when the simulations pointed only to {expected}
well clear of a predicted {expected}
carbon brakes glowing into the heavy braking zones
the semi-automatic gearbox snapping cleanly through the ratios
every corner logged to the telemetry
the electronics and the driver working in concert
the active-era machinery held right at its limit
{winner} had the beating of the field this time
the duel with {winner} defined the afternoon
{winner} settled the argument at the front
A full season's data, distilled to a single line in the record book.
The trucks head for winter; a campaign's worth of numbers goes under the microscope.
One season logged and closed, the next already on the drawing board.
default: Attention turns to the year ahead.

1990s: {pool:dateline} {player} won {race} for {team}, controlling round {round} of the {year} season from lights to flag. Ahead of a field of {fieldSize}, {pool:techNote}, the margin never in doubt. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} Victory at {race} for {player}. The {team} car was quickest on the stopwatch all weekend, and the race told the same story {pool:expectationBeat}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} {player} takes {race}. A measured, telemetry-perfect drive delivered {team} the win over {fieldSize} rivals, {pool:techNote}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
default: {player} won {race} for {team}, leading home a field of {fieldSize}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}

1990s: {pool:dateline} A podium for {player}, home {position} at {race}. {team} ran with the front-runners in a field of {fieldSize}, though {pool:rivalLine}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} {player} climbed the rostrum at {race}, {position} at the flag {pool:expectationBeat}. The {team} car had genuine pace, {pool:techNote}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} Rostrum composure from {player} — {position} at {race}, kept honest to the flag by {winner}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}

{pool:dateline} {player} banked points at {race}, {position} at the flag from a field of {fieldSize}. No podium, but the championship account grows and {winner} won the day. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} A clean, efficient afternoon for {player}: {position} at {race} and useful points for {team}. The telemetry shows a car managed, not thrown away. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} A standout drive from {player} at {race}, {position} {pool:expectationBeat}. The {team} garage will study how the data allowed it. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} {player} overachieved at {race}, dragging {team} to {position} in a field of {fieldSize}, {pool:techNote}. The drive of the day by any measure. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}

{pool:dateline} An underwhelming afternoon for {player}, {position} at {race} when {expected} was the realistic target. {team} will interrogate the telemetry for the shortfall. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeBad}
{pool:dateline} {player} lacked pace at {race}, home {position} in a field of {fieldSize}. {winner} led a race that never came to the {team} driver. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeBad}
default: {player} was below par at {race}, only {position} when {expected} was expected. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeBad}

1990s: {pool:dateline} Mechanical failure ended {player}'s race at {race}, the {team} car stopping while it ran with promise and {expected} within reach. {winner} took the win over a field of {fieldSize}. {pool:closeBad}
{pool:dateline} The technology bit back at {race}: a component let go and {player} was out, no blame to the driver. All the data in the world counts for nothing when the car stops. {pool:closeBad}
{pool:dateline} {player} threw it away at {race}, a misjudgement into a braking zone ending the {team} run where {expected} had beckoned. {winner} led home {fieldSize} cars. {pool:closeBad}
{pool:dateline} An error of the driver's own making at {race}: {player} into the barriers and out, the telemetry showing a corner asked too much of. {pool:closeBad}
default: {player} crashed out of {race} through driver error. {pool:closeBad}

1990s: {pool:dateline} A steady, unremarkable run for {player}, {position} at {race} in a field of {fieldSize}. The data shows a car brought home without drama. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
{pool:dateline} Little to report from {player} at {race}, {position} behind {winner}. A quiet, professional afternoon for {team}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}
default: {player} ran to {position} at {race}, a quiet afternoon for {team}. {pool:champLine} {pool:closeGood}

1990s: The {year} season is complete, and the title table settles on a single name: {player}. A methodical, season-long campaign hands {team} the championship, earned round by round and written into the numbers. {pool:seasonClose}

Champions are made across a full season, and the {year} data leaves no argument — {player} is world champion. {team} turned pace into points with a consistency the paddock will study for years. {pool:seasonClose}
default: {player} is the {year} champion, a title season for {team}. {pool:seasonClose}

1990s: The {year} championship is decided: {champLeader} takes the title, while {player} closes the season {champPosition} for {team}. The margins tell the story of where the campaign was won and lost. {pool:seasonClose}

Season's end, and the final standings read {champLeader} champion of {year}, {player} classified {champPosition}. {team} turn to the winter and the data that separated them from the front. {pool:seasonClose}
default: {champLeader} took the {year} title; {player} finished the year {champPosition}. {pool:seasonClose}
